sys_script_fix.description: //GET BAN ACCOUNTS THAT WERE MAPPED WITH MDMD3 Account number via transformation map //GET releted CAN account created from MDM3 and populate expected attrs into BAN.
sys_script_fix.name: LTC Merge atributes from CAN to BAN acc
sys_script_fix.sys_name: LTC Merge atributes from CAN to BAN acc
